holdings.infoBox: FLLA is an equity ETF with a total of 137 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vale S.A. stock at 7.10%, Itaú Unibanco Holding at 5.37%, Grupo Mexico SAB de CV Class B at 4.40%, Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. - Petrobras at 4.26%, and Grupo Financiero Banorte at 3.93%.

overview.description: The Franklin FTSE Latin America ETF (FLLA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Latin America RIC Capped index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap Latin American equities. FLLA was launched on Oct 9, 2018 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
infoTable: FTSE Latin America RIC Capped Index
